title: Iran's Shahed drone: How 'the poor man’s cruise missile’ is shaping Tehran’s retaliation
summary_full: After years on the front lines of Russia's invasion of Ukraine, the Iranian Shahed-136 drone is at the center of Tehran's retaliation against recent U.S. strikes.
summary_public: After years on the front lines of Russia's invasion of Ukraine, the Iranian Shahed-136 drone is at the center of Tehran's retaliation against recent U.S. strikes.
